title: IISER Pune Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
organization: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Pune
short_info: IISER Pune is recruiting 1 Project Research Scientist-II post on a temporary & contractual basis under ICMR funded project.

important_dates.reporting time: 10:00 AM (Candidates reporting after 10:30 AM will not be considered)
important_dates.venue: Seminar Room No. 33, Main Building, IISER Pune

age_limit.details: Not more than 40 years as on the last date of application. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates having higher qualification and/or experience with the prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry or related areas with minimum 3 years of Post-Doctoral experience.

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Candidates must bring duly filled application form along with all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies.
how_to_apply: Candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview on 09 June 2026 at the given venue. Download the application form from the official IISER Pune website and fill it carefully. Bring all required documents as mentioned above.
Venue: Seminar Room No.33, Main Building, IISER Pune
important_instructions: The appointment is purely temporary and contractual. It will automatically terminate upon completion of the project. No claim for regular appointment or absorption in IISER Pune or ICMR. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Selected candidates must join immediately.
